parameters.query:
INSERT INTO exams (
  exam_code,
  title,
  description,
  class_code,
  subject_code,
  subject_name,
  exam_type,
  teacher_id,
  question_file_path,
  answer_file_path,
  status,
  created_at,
  updated_at,
  created_by,
  updated_by
) VALUES (
  '{{ ($json.exam_code || '').replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  '{{ ($json.title || '').replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  {{ $json.description ? `'${$json.description.replace(/'/g, "''")}'` : 'NULL' }},
  {{ $json.class_code ? `'${$json.class_code.replace(/'/g, "''")}'` : 'NULL' }},
  {{ $json.subject_code ? `'${$json.subject_code.replace(/'/g, "''")}'` : 'NULL' }},
  {{ $json.subject_name ? `'${$json.subject_name.replace(/'/g, "''")}'` : 'NULL' }},
  '{{ ($json.exam_type || '').replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  {{ Number($json.teacher_id) }},
  {{ $json.question_file_path ? `'${$json.question_file_path.replace(/'/g, "''")}'` : 'NULL' }},
  {{ $json.answer_file_path ? `'${$json.answer_file_path.replace(/'/g, "''")}'` : 'NULL' }},
  'processing',
  NOW(),
  NOW(),
  {{ Number($json.teacher_id) }},
  {{ Number($json.teacher_id) }}
) RETURNING id AS exam_id, exam_code, title, description, class_code, subject_code, subject_name, exam_type, teacher_id, question_file_path, answer_file_path, status;

INSERT INTO system_logs (
  log_type,
  ref_table,
  ref_id,
  exam_id,
  class_code,
  workflow_execution_id,
  model_name,
  status,
  message,
  request_payload,
  created_at,
  created_by,
  updated_by
) VALUES (
  'exam_extract',
  'exams',
  {{ $json.exam_id }},
  {{ $json.exam_id }},
  {{ $json.class_code ? `'${$json.class_code.replace(/'/g, "''")}'` : 'NULL' }},
  '{{ $execution.id }}',
  'google-drive + mistral-ocr-latest + gpt-4.1-mini',
  'running',
  'Da nhan upload_exam qua API, dang upload file len Drive va OCR dap an.',
  jsonb_build_object(
    'exam_code', '{{ ($json.exam_code || '').replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
    'title', '{{ ($json.title || '').replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
    'question_file', '{{ ($json.question_filename || '').replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
    'answer_file', '{{ ($json.answer_filename || '').replace(/'/g, "''") }}'
  ),
  NOW(),
  {{ Number.isInteger(Number($json.teacher_id)) ? Number($json.teacher_id) : 'NULL' }},
  {{ Number.isInteger(Number($json.teacher_id)) ? Number($json.teacher_id) : 'NULL' }}
);

INSERT INTO system_logs (
  log_type,
  ref_table,
  ref_id,
  exam_id,
  class_code,
  workflow_execution_id,
  model_name,
  status,
  message,
  response_payload,
  created_at,
  created_by,
  updated_by
) VALUES (
  'exam_extract',
  'exams',
  {{ $('Create exam record').item.json.exam_id }},
  {{ $('Create exam record').item.json.exam_id }},
  {{ $json.class_code ? `'${$json.class_code.replace(/'/g, "''")}'` : 'NULL' }},
  '{{ $execution.id }}',
  'mistral-ocr-latest',
  'running',
  'OCR dap an hoan tat, chuyen sang chuan hoa JSON.',
  jsonb_build_object(
    'exam_code', '{{ ($json.exam_code || '').replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
    'question_file_path', '{{ ($json.question_file_path || '').replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
    'answer_file_path', '{{ ($json.answer_file_path || '').replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
    'page_count', {{ Number($json.page_count || 0) }},
    'markdown_length', {{ Number(($json.markdown || '').length) }}
  ),
  NOW(),
  {{ Number.isInteger(Number($json.teacher_id)) ? Number($json.teacher_id) : 'NULL' }},
  {{ Number.isInteger(Number($json.teacher_id)) ? Number($json.teacher_id) : 'NULL' }}
);

parameters.jsCode:
const source = $('Restore OCR context').first();
return [{ json: { ...source.json } }];

values.content:
=Ban la AI trich xuat dap an va rubric tu OCR markdown cua dap an mau.

Muc tieu:
Tra ve DUY NHAT mot JSON object hop le theo dung contract ben duoi, khong markdown, khong giai thich them.

Contract output:
{
  "questions": [
    {
      "question_no": "1",
      "question_text": "...",
      "question_type": "essay" | "multiple_choice" | "unknown",
      "options": ["A", "B", "C", "D"],
      "expected_answer": "...",
      "rubrics": [
        {
          "key": "...",
          "score": 0.5
        }
      ],
      "max_score": 2
    }
  ],
  "total_max_score": 10
}

Quy tac:
1. Neu la tu luan, options de [] va question_type = "essay".
2. Neu la trac nghiem, tach phuong an vao options va expected_answer la dap an dung neu OCR nhin thay.
3. Neu khong xac dinh duoc so cau, dat question_no theo thu tu 1, 2, 3...
4. max_score la so, neu khong ro thi dung 1 cho trac nghiem va 2 cho tu luan.
5. rubrics la mang cac y cham chinh; neu khong co thi tra ve [].
6. Bo phan dau mo rong khong lien quan nhu ten truong, ten mon, thoi gian thi, chi dan hanh chinh.
7. total_max_score la tong max_score cua cac cau neu co the tinh duoc, neu khong thi tra ve null.
8. Neu OCR rat kem va khong tach duoc cau hoi, tra ve {"questions": [], "total_max_score": null}.

Input OCR markdown:
{{ $json.markdown }}

parameters.jsCode:
const result = $('Build final SQL').first().json;
return [{ json: { ok: true, message: 'upload_exam API completed successfully', exam_id: result.exam_id, exam_code: result.exam_code, status: result.status, answer_extract: result.answer_extract } }];
